summary: Comprehensive testing of ICEN iteration 3 features completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: phone field in Apply form and Admin drawer, hero section changes (removed 'Est. MMXXVI', added refined 'International Council for Emerging Nations' with italic blue), footer changes, clickable Home page cards (pillar/region/tier/impact), Blog tag filters, Research pillar filters, and Pillars page navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Phone field was missing from Apply form review step - added it to the dl/dd list in Apply.jsx
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 6 blog posts (with various tags) and 5 research papers (with pillars) on startup. Test applications created with TEST_ prefix during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features working correctly. Phone field added to applications (backend + frontend form + admin drawer + review step). Home page cards are clickable (pillar→/pillars/:slug, region→/chapters, tier→/membership, impact→/programs or /pillars/:slug). Hero shows refined 'International Council for Emerging Nations' with italic blue. 'Est. MMXXVI' removed from hero and footer. Blog has tag filters (All + 17 unique tags). Research has pillar filters (All + 5 pillars). Load More buttons only appear when filtered count exceeds PAGE_SIZE (9 for blog, 8 for research).

backend.POST /api/applications with phone: PASS - Creates application with phone field, returns phone in response
backend.POST /api/applications without phone: PASS - Phone is optional, application created successfully
backend.GET /api/admin/applications: PASS - Returns phone field in application list
backend.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns counts including blog_posts and research_papers
backend.GET /api/blog: PASS - Returns 6 seeded blog posts with tags
backend.GET /api/blog/{slug}: PASS - Returns single post, 404 for invalid
backend.Admin blog CRUD: PASS - Create, update, delete all work
backend.GET /api/research: PASS - Returns 5 seeded research papers with pillars
backend.GET /api/research/{slug}: PASS - Returns single paper, 404 for invalid
backend.Admin research CRUD: PASS - Create, update, delete all work

frontend.Home hero section: PASS - 'Est. MMXXVI' removed, refined 'International Council for Emerging Nations' with italic blue 'for Emerging Nations' present
frontend.Home region cards: PASS - 8 region cards, all clickable, navigate to /chapters
frontend.Apply form phone input: PASS - Phone input present with data-testid='apply-phone', label 'Phone (with country code)'
frontend.Apply form review step: PASS - Phone field displayed in review (fixed during testing)
frontend.Apply form submission: PASS - Application with phone submits successfully
frontend.Admin dashboard phone display: PASS - Phone field visible in application drawer
frontend.Blog tag filters: PASS - 'All' + 17 unique tags, filtering works correctly
frontend.Blog Load More: PASS - Not visible (6 posts < PAGE_SIZE of 9)
frontend.Research Load More: PASS - Not visible (5 papers < PAGE_SIZE of 8)

fixes_applied.Apply.jsx review step: Added Phone row to the review step dl/dd list - was missing from original implementation
